title: zanthoxylum canalense
intro: Zanthoxylum canalense, also known as the Philippine pepper or Philippine rue, is a plant species in the genus Zanthoxylum. It is a deciduous shrub native to the Philippines and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and ease pain. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum canalense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
